key_improvements.primary_method: ElevenLabs Speech-to-Text API with word-level timestamp granularity (when API key has permission)
key_improvements.fallback_method: faster-whisper base model (CPU, int8) with automatic fallback trigger
key_improvements.caption_blocking: Intelligent grouping (8-12 words per segment, respects punctuation)
key_improvements.integration: Auto-called by audio_agent.py after MP3 generation — seamless pipeline
key_improvements.robustness: Comprehensive error handling: API timeout (5 min), invalid responses, missing audio files
key_improvements.performance: Whisper base model runs on CPU in int8 mode (fast, low memory)
key_improvements.timestamp_accuracy: Word-level precision enables tight sync with video animation timeline

function_signatures.purpose: Main entry point - tries ElevenLabs, falls back to whisper, validates output
ElevenLabs API call with scribe_v1 model and word-level timestamps
faster-whisper fallback with language detection and segment transcription
Groups word-level timestamps into SRT caption blocks (8-12 words, respects punctuation)
Converts float seconds to SRT timestamp format HH:MM:SS,mmm

cli_usage.integration: Called automatically by audio_agent.py after audio generation
cli_usage.exit_code_1: Failure (no audio file, all methods failed)

backward_compatibility: Full backward compatibility maintained. Function signatures unchanged from external perspective (still generate_srt(episode_num)).
